subcodes.title: Suriy-i-Fu'ad (=Lawh-i-Fu'ad)
subcodes.first_line: Káf. Ẓá’. We call unto thee from beyond the sea of grandeur, upon the crimson land, above the horizon of tribulation.
subcodes.first_line_orig: ک ظ نادیناک عن وراء قلزم الکبریا علی الارض الحمرا من افق البلا انه لا اله
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @justice and wrath of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @call to action, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @power of prayer
